Match # 121

2025-07-13 16:08:52
Like
2025-07-13 17:24:15
Match
2025-07-13 23:48:51
Chat: Heyyy how was your weekend??
2025-07-14 11:28:09
Chat: That’s nice :)
2025-07-14 11:28:32
Chat: My sister was in town so we just hung out together, it was pretty great!
2025-07-14 11:28:45
Chat: Had a concert on Saturday night tooo
2025-07-14 11:29:17
Chat: What kind of music do you listen to?
2025-07-14 15:53:42
Chat: Haha really? Is it good?
2025-07-14 15:53:47
Chat: I haven’t heard the soundtrack at all
2025-07-14 15:54:14
Chat: My sister and I went to still woozy lol, you might have heard of them?
2025-07-14 15:54:27
Chat: He’s popular in the indie/psychedelic space
2025-07-14 20:13:54
Chat: Haha glad you like it!
2025-07-14 20:14:08
Chat: I work at a hedge fund called Millennium?
2025-07-14 20:14:13
Chat: Have you heard of it?
2025-07-15 12:06:26
Chat: Omg none of the above haha
2025-07-15 12:06:34
Chat: I am… a lowly software engineer 😅
2025-07-15 12:06:41
Chat: It’s ok you can laugh lol
2025-07-15 13:42:36
Chat: Aww ok thank you
2025-07-15 13:42:39
Chat: I appreciate it
2025-07-15 13:42:45
Chat: Yeah I do enjoy the role
2025-07-15 13:42:51
Chat: And it pays very well 😅😭
2025-07-15 17:18:34
Chat: It’s alright 😅😅😅
2025-07-15 17:18:37
Chat: Not the best honestly
2025-07-15 17:18:44
Chat: This job has eaten up a bit of my soul
2025-07-15 17:18:49
Chat: It used to be super chill
2025-07-15 17:18:54
Chat: But this project has been a pain in the ass
2025-07-15 17:19:01
Chat: Wbu, how’s your work life balance?

Chat: Heyy happy Monday :)

Chat: I came home early from work but I’m still working lol

Chat: Oh nice!!!

Chat: I’m at jury duty haha

Chat: It’s such a dud
2025-07-16 18:13:34
Chat: Wbu, how’s your day going

Chat: I hate push day hah
2025-07-17 12:56:20
Chat: It’s my least favorite
2025-07-17 12:56:24
Chat: I’m more of a legs girlie
2025-07-17 12:56:49
Chat: Jury duty was so boring lol, but at least we got dismissed early!

Chat: Nothing major honestly
2025-07-18 14:32:45

2025-07-18 14:32:59
Chat: And I didn’t even get questioned for jury duty so there’s nothing to talk about lol

Chat: Okie sounds good :) do you want my number btw?

2025-07-16 22:39:17
Chat: I’m good, had jury duty today so overall chill day :) wbu?
2025-07-17 12:57:16
Chat: It was my first time doing jury duty!
2025-07-17 12:57:20
Chat: So boring tho
2025-07-17 15:33:23
Chat: I didn’t even get selected for the case lol
2025-07-17 15:33:31
Chat: I think it got settled bc no one got selected
2025-07-17 15:33:35
Chat: We were all sent home!
2025-07-17 15:33:40
Chat: And I’m a software engineer :)
2025-07-17 15:33:43
Chat: Wbu?
2025-07-17 18:23:29
Chat: Nice nice
2025-07-17 18:31:26
Chat: I have soooo many tats haha
2025-07-17 18:31:27
Chat: Oops
2025-07-17 18:31:32
Chat: But thank you 🥹
2025-07-17 18:31:38
Chat: I’ve had the nose ring since I was 16!
2025-07-17 18:31:44
Chat: One could call me emo 🤔
2025-07-17 18:37:23
Chat: Yeah same lol
2025-07-17 18:37:26
Chat: I’m not emo anymore
2025-07-17 18:37:33
Chat: But I guess the tats make me kinda emo lol
2025-07-17 18:38:04
Chat: My parents HATE the tattoos btw haha
2025-07-17 18:38:11
Chat: Which I… weirdly understand honestly
2025-07-17 18:38:18
Chat: It goes against our culture I suppose
2025-07-17 18:38:22
Chat: But I can’t help ittt
2025-07-17 18:38:25
Chat: They’re so fun 😭
2025-07-17 18:38:31
Chat: And all my tattoos are wholesome
2025-07-17 18:38:34
Chat: Nature themed
2025-07-17 19:11:44
Chat: One of my tattoos is a poppy flower!
2025-07-17 19:11:59
Chat: Omg I will never get a tattoo on the back of my neck lol
2025-07-17 19:12:01
Chat: Too painful
2025-07-17 20:06:51
Chat: Yeah I do! Wbu?

2025-07-28 15:44:12
Chat: You’re the first guy to spell it wrong and then apologize 😭
2025-07-28 15:44:16
Chat: I appreciate it haha
2025-07-28 15:44:23
Chat: What is sherry short for?
2025-07-28 16:21:58
Chat: Thank you 🥹
2025-07-28 16:22:04
Chat: My whole first name is Amirthavarshini haha
2025-07-28 16:22:09
Chat: Also I like your name too!
2025-07-28 16:22:12
Chat: It’s nice
2025-07-28 16:22:15
Chat: How’s your day going?
2025-07-28 17:13:19
Chat: My day is ok… just at work haha
2025-07-28 17:13:32
Chat: It’s kind of boring :)
2025-07-28 17:14:03
Chat: Dissertation! What’s it on?
2025-07-28 19:29:30
Chat: That is the most badass dissertation I’ve ever heard
2025-07-28 19:29:44
Chat: Spitting facts!
2025-07-28 19:29:56
Chat: I studied at Columbia for a few years, graduated in May!
2025-07-28 19:30:09
Chat: Work is ok now :) it was stressful until literally this week
2025-07-28 19:30:15
Chat: I finally have time for the gym again haha
2025-07-28 20:07:13
Chat: You’re not old lol
2025-07-28 20:07:15
Chat: Don’t even say that!
2025-07-28 20:07:24
Chat: Yesss I will def enjoy my workout
2025-07-28 20:07:25
Chat: It’s leg day
2025-07-28 20:07:32
Chat: It’s going to be bad but I am ready
2025-07-28 20:07:38
Chat: Do you work out?
2025-07-29 01:01:28
Chat: I just got back into the routine!
2025-07-29 01:01:36
Chat: I used to work out 3-4 days a week
2025-07-29 01:01:52
Chat: I love lifting haha
2025-07-29 01:01:57
Chat: I just did legs today
2025-07-29 01:02:00
Chat: It was fantastic
2025-07-29 01:38:51
Chat: Haha
2025-07-29 01:38:56
Chat: I appreciate the sentiment
2025-07-29 01:39:16
Chat: Yeah maybe I can introduce you to my leg day sometime lol
2025-07-29 01:39:18
Chat: It’ll be insane
2025-07-29 02:54:11
Chat: That doesn’t have to be our first date lol
2025-07-29 02:54:23
Chat: Maybe for our first date we can just get dinner or drinks or something
2025-07-29 14:23:14
Chat: Yknow, I could be free tn or Thursday night :)
2025-07-29 14:23:18
Chat: I do have the gym today
2025-07-29 14:23:28
Chat: Oh wait actually
2025-07-29 14:23:44
Chat: I have physical therapy today oof
2025-07-29 14:23:48
Chat: How about Thursday haha

Chat: Hi sorry forgot to open this app 🤦‍♀️
2025-07-31 23:43:28

2025-08-12 17:58:46
Chat: Happy Tuesday :)
2025-08-13 02:32:19
Chat: It was great! I worked and then went to the gym
2025-08-13 02:32:31
Chat: I’m all tired and in bed now
2025-08-13 02:53:13
Chat: Nice you swim? Is that your regular workout routine?
2025-08-13 11:32:41
Chat: I lift 3 days a week and play pickleball!
2025-08-13 20:10:27
Chat: Yeah haha
2025-08-13 20:10:35
Chat: Today is actually pull day hehe
2025-08-13 20:10:43
Chat: I think Sunday I will do pickleball
2025-08-13 20:11:04
Chat: Btw mid day nap hits so hard
2025-08-13 20:11:10
Chat: I love those lol
2025-08-13 20:11:14
Chat: I could go for one rn tbh
2025-08-14 00:27:41
Chat: Omg nice nice hehe
2025-08-14 00:27:48
Chat: Did you have any dreams 🥹
2025-08-14 11:36:08
Chat: I love dreams haha
2025-08-14 11:36:11
Chat: I have them a lot
2025-08-14 11:36:20
Chat: I have very vivid dreams as well!
2025-08-14 11:36:29
Chat: They’re so fun
2025-08-14 11:36:35
Chat: I can’t believe you don’t like them lol
2025-08-14 17:58:01
Chat: Awww 🥹

Chat: Hi I’m so sorry! I didn’t check this app for a few hours 😭😭
2025-08-15 22:59:04

2025-08-15 23:41:44
Chat: Ok no worries :) enjoy the show!

Chat: Hey!!
2025-08-28 12:58:01
Chat: Glad we’re on the same page :)
2025-08-28 12:58:39
Chat: My self care is a bit all over the place but honestly just my nighttime routine and reading a good book always feels great!
2025-08-28 12:58:47
Chat: My week is going well, hbu?
2025-08-28 18:23:59
Chat: Tons of suggestions haha
2025-08-28 18:24:10
Chat: The first one I recommend is Molecule of More
2025-08-28 18:24:19
Chat: It’s a neuroscience book on dopamine
2025-08-28 18:24:27
Chat: And the reward circuit pathway in our brains
2025-08-28 18:25:08
Chat: I also recommend this book on women’s sexual health called Come As You Are :) I’m reading it rn and it’s so good

2025-09-01 16:33:08

2025-09-01 16:33:15
Chat: Gave me the balls to swipe on you!
2025-09-01 16:35:11
Chat: How was your Labor Day weekend? Hopefully some couch rotting included
2025-09-01 16:46:57
Chat: LOL I’m glad I had some courage in me today
2025-09-01 16:47:02
Chat: I normally don’t 😅
2025-09-01 16:47:19
Chat: I was in Boston all weekend, helping my sister move into her dorm
2025-09-01 16:47:22
Chat: She’s a sophomore at BU
2025-09-01 16:47:31
Chat: It was honestly hell driving thru the city
2025-09-01 16:47:48
Chat: I’m so glad to not have a rental car now and to be back in NYC. I missed it here 😭😭😭
2025-09-01 16:48:06
Chat: You’re from Boston right?
2025-09-01 17:03:51
Chat: You have a car here???
2025-09-01 17:03:53

2025-09-01 17:04:46

2025-09-01 17:04:53
Chat: But my family lives in Illinois now
2025-09-01 17:05:52

Chat: Absolutely!!
2025-09-06 16:40:50
Chat: What kind of shows do you watch in general? Anything rn?
2025-09-06 21:53:07
Chat: Ooh is it good? What genre is it?
2025-09-07 21:52:36
Chat: Hi good evening
2025-09-07 21:52:41
Chat: Sorry I had a long ass 24 hours
2025-09-07 21:52:49
Chat: I was bad about responding to messages for a bit
2025-09-07 21:54:19
Chat: How was your Saturday night?
2025-09-07 23:21:17
Chat: That’s great actually
2025-09-07 23:21:38
Chat: Tacos sound amazing
2025-09-07 23:23:02
Chat: I am currently wondering if I should finish off my jackfruit biryani that I ordered or have some of the naan and dal that I also ordered!
2025-09-07 23:23:08
Chat: I was feeling lazy today
2025-09-07 23:23:17
Chat: I have slept 5 hours this weekend aside from naps lol
2025-09-08 12:29:49
Chat: Ahh yes yes
2025-09-08 12:29:58
Chat: I’m taking half a sick day at work today lol
2025-09-08 12:30:03
Chat: To catch up on sleep
2025-09-08 12:30:34
Chat: I’m not skipping the gym tho 😤😤
2025-09-08 12:30:43
Chat: Leg day doesn’t miss out for anything
2025-09-08 23:15:47
Chat: Moooood
2025-09-08 23:16:02
Chat: I ended up not going to the gym bc I am actually so sleep deprived that I slept the whole day 😅😅😅
2025-09-08 23:16:06
Chat: But it’s ok
2025-09-08 23:16:10
Chat: I can go tmrw
2025-09-09 17:52:09
Chat: Haha
2025-09-09 17:52:32
Chat: Well my gym is pretty great so maybe someday I could introduce you to my leg day routine >:)
2025-09-09 18:26:16
Chat: Hehe
2025-09-09 18:26:20
Chat: It’s actually leg day today for me
2025-09-09 18:26:35
Chat: Idk if I’m gonna go cuz I’m scared I’m falling sick and catching a cold or smth 😬😬
2025-09-09 22:45:06
Chat: I ended up going >:]]]
2025-09-09 22:45:11
Chat: It was great
2025-09-09 22:45:25
Chat: Wait text me at +15515564999
2025-09-09 22:45:37
Chat: I will send you the progress pics and fitness app screenshot

2025-09-06 19:53:07
Chat: Teach me the ways 🙏
2025-09-06 19:53:30
Chat: Also, I really like your prompt on empathy and being nice to pigeons :) I’m big on animal welfare and have 3 rescue cats myself!!!
2025-09-06 19:53:41
Chat: I actually saved a baby pigeon in the streets of NYC once haha
2025-09-06 19:53:52
Chat: This guy was intimidating the injured bird that couldn’t fly away
2025-09-06 19:54:34
Chat: I stepped in and yelled at the guy, who almost got aggressive with me and then just walked away
2025-09-06 19:55:02
Chat: Then I took the bird in a box via uber all the way uptown to a bird rescue!

2025-09-11 18:43:07
Chat: Hi how’s it going!
2025-09-11 19:42:22
Chat: You wanna know smth hilarious
2025-09-11 19:42:26
Chat: I got laid off today
2025-09-11 19:42:35
Chat: :)
2025-09-11 19:42:43
Chat: Not even joking lol, it happened this morning
2025-09-11 19:42:58
Chat: So I’m in bed, moping for a little bit before I pull myself together out of this funk
2025-09-11 19:44:12
Chat: It’s ok!!
2025-09-11 19:44:23
Chat: I already have interviews and other prospectives lined up
2025-09-11 19:44:33
Chat: They gave me a generous severance and payout
2025-09-11 19:45:05
Chat: “Easy”
2025-09-11 19:45:11
Chat: I do suck at technical interviews lol
2025-09-11 19:45:18
Chat: But it’s ok we shall see
2025-09-11 19:47:30
Chat: Maybe I should…
2025-09-11 19:47:34
Chat: I’m not sure honestly
2025-09-11 19:48:07
Chat: Also omg you live deep in Jersey
2025-09-11 21:20:26
Chat: Interesting
2025-09-11 21:20:33
Chat: That’s still far!!!
2025-09-11 21:20:39
Chat: Do you take the bus into the city?
2025-09-20 11:49:28
Chat: I never said there was an issue…?
2025-09-20 11:50:34
Chat: We matched on the day that I got laid off. Can you imagine that maybe I’ve been stressed for job interviews and just a little busy with them and maybe forgot to respond?
2025-09-20 11:50:41
Chat: You just jumped to conclusions
2025-09-20 20:03:21
Remove

2025-09-13 19:13:52
Chat: No we haven’t lol
2025-09-13 22:58:04
Chat: It’s been fun but tiring 😅 hbu?
2025-09-14 06:10:00
Chat: Spent a good chunk of the day sleeping and just doing some chores
2025-09-14 06:10:05
Chat: Hung out with friends
2025-09-14 06:10:17
Chat: Then went on a very small bar hop with friends!
2025-09-14 12:19:15
Chat: Some sake bar and a place called the headless widow in east village
2025-09-14 12:20:00
Chat: Hotel?
2025-09-14 12:20:10
Chat: Are you staying in a hotel rn?
2025-09-14 14:15:51
Chat: Interesting
2025-09-14 14:15:59
Chat: Have you seen the show Silicon Valley?
2025-09-14 14:16:25
Chat: I do like sake but tbh I’m careful with alcohol these days 😅😅😅
2025-09-14 14:16:45
Chat: Wbu what’s your go to cocktail
2025-09-14 16:17:00
Chat: I’m a vodka redbull girly 😅😅
2025-09-14 16:17:12
Chat: I do not watch golf or F1 unfortunately
2025-09-14 16:17:17
Chat: Big football fan tho
2025-09-14 16:17:53
Chat: It’s not my favorite show but it’s an EXCELLENT show - I was gonna say that your job sounds like one of the characters’ jobs
2025-09-14 21:19:49
Chat: NFL
2025-09-14 21:20:23
Chat: It’s NFL Sunday today 🥹
2025-09-14 21:20:29
Chat: Are you watching any of the games?
2025-09-15 00:14:35
Chat: Wait you interned at the NFL?? That’s so cool!
2025-09-15 00:14:41
Chat: Were you in the NYC office?
2025-09-15 00:15:06
Chat: I am a dolphins fan :(( we suck this year tho
2025-09-15 01:30:44
Chat: But yall beat the cowboys today!
2025-09-15 01:56:33
Chat: Oh
2025-09-15 01:56:36
Chat: My bad
2025-09-15 01:57:05
Chat: Sorry to hear that :(((
2025-09-15 01:59:18
Chat: Omg you’re a knicks fan 😬
2025-09-15 01:59:21
Chat: I’m a Celtics fan
2025-09-15 02:07:40
Chat: That’s so real
2025-09-15 02:07:47
Chat: I’m not looking forward to it
2025-09-15 02:10:52
Chat: Tennis! Sometimes
2025-09-15 02:15:20
Chat: I like to work out, hang with friends, go out, play with my cats, play pickleball, read, write, etc
2025-09-15 02:17:18
Chat: 👀

Match # 774

2025-09-19 23:44:06
Match
2025-09-20 00:30:06
Chat: You mind if I send an audio recording?
2025-09-20 00:30:20
Chat: I feel like it’s easier to explain via audio as opposed to a long text message haha
2025-09-20 00:30:28
Chat: I could totally rant on this subject all day
2025-09-20 02:27:01
Chat:
2025-09-20 02:27:01
Voice Note:
2025-09-20 11:48:38
Chat: I still experience a lot of nagging 😅
2025-09-20 11:48:44
Chat: I just read a great book actually
2025-09-20 11:48:57
Chat: “Adult children of emotionally immature parents”
2025-09-20 11:49:00
Chat: Great read
2025-09-20 11:49:10
Chat: Taught me how to better set boundaries with my parents
2025-09-20 12:39:07
Chat: Well, I suppose I don’t do it in the best way
2025-09-20 12:39:18
Chat: But if my parents start crossing my boundary I politely let them know
2025-09-20 12:39:32
Chat: Like “hey, I don’t appreciate where this conversation is going and this is my limit”
2025-09-20 12:39:39
Chat: They usually just keep going anyway 😅
2025-09-20 12:39:50
Chat: And that’s when I just hang up the fucking phone
2025-09-20 12:40:32
Chat: I think I need to reread the book frankly but in general I’ve set certain topics with my parents off limits
2025-09-20 12:40:39
Chat: Like politics, my dating history, etc
2025-09-20 13:20:03
Chat: lol so what do you tell your parents and grandparents??
2025-09-20 19:08:38
Chat: That’s totally fair
2025-09-20 19:08:56
Chat: Speaking of relationships, what are you looking for on here?
2025-09-20 20:05:22
Chat: Lmaooo tbh I am REALLY curious to hear these standards of yours 👀
2025-09-20 20:05:56
Chat: I haven’t been looking for anything serious, but that’s also because I haven’t been taking anyone seriously since no one has been WORTH taking seriously 😅😅😅
2025-09-20 20:06:14
Chat: Sorry that’s kinda mean
2025-09-20 20:06:25
Chat: The dating scene here in NYC is balls tho
2025-09-20 20:12:35
Chat: 🤯🤯🤯
2025-09-20 20:12:48
Chat: Ok actually thank you for the honest feedback
2025-09-20 20:12:55
Chat: I genuinely did not realize
2025-09-20 20:13:09
Chat: Is that why the guys liking my profile have been such douches so far
2025-09-20 20:14:43
Chat: Omg
2025-09-20 20:14:48
Chat: My mind is genuinely blown
2025-09-20 20:15:23
Chat: I meant what I said above
2025-09-20 20:16:12
Chat: I haven’t been looking for anything serious but deep down I want the right guy to come into my life and give me a reason to believe in love again 😅 yknow what I mean?
2025-09-20 20:16:28
Chat: I think I’ve just been burned too many times these past few years
2025-09-20 20:16:38
Chat: Anyway yeah I can ramble about all this in person too
2025-09-20 20:18:40
Chat: I don’t believe anyone will magically make me feel ready. And honestly for someone like me, perhaps I may never be fully ready. But that’s what a good support system is for - the gentle pushes and reminders that you’re worthy of everything you want in life… if that makes any sense at all
2025-09-20 20:19:01
Chat: I think I’ve been working really hard at being a better person and trying to love myself more
2025-09-20 20:19:33
Chat: And frankly this whole “not looking for anything serious” thing? My therapist called me out on it week one 😅
2025-09-20 20:19:49
Chat: She literally was like “I see you” LOL
2025-09-20 20:19:58
Chat: Smh I’m too easy to read
2025-09-20 20:21:47
Chat: Never heard of it
2025-09-20 20:24:17
Chat: Interestinggg
2025-09-20 20:24:22
Chat: That’s really smart actually
2025-09-20 20:24:45
Chat: I think I’m more the latter personally, I’m still designing my dream home but I don’t mind picking out a lamp
2025-09-20 20:26:06
Chat: You live in Staten Island right?
2025-09-20 20:26:24
Chat: I live in Fidi actually, very close to south ferry
2025-09-20 20:26:37
Chat: I think if you’re interested, we should get a coffee sometime
2025-09-20 20:26:57
Chat: I’d say this is all worth a chat in person :)
2025-09-20 20:28:54
Chat: I could be down, only thing is that I’m currently seriously grinding for job interviews rn. I got laid off a few weeks ago and am in mid to late stages with a few companies, so if all goes well I won’t be friggin unemployed anymore 🤧 but I REALLY need to focus
2025-09-20 20:29:18
Chat: I’m still down for a date but I can’t commit to more than a few hours at a time
2025-09-20 20:31:05
Chat: How’s your Monday looking?
2025-09-20 20:33:58
Chat: Coooool. You should text me bc I hate dating apps and never enable notifications for them :) 5515564999

Match # 775

2025-09-20 00:01:30
Like
2025-09-21 01:44:56
Match
2025-09-21 02:26:41
Chat: Hmmm
2025-09-21 02:26:49
Chat: Bill Clinton is from Arkansas? lol idk
2025-09-21 02:26:57
Chat: Nothing about Arkansas is inherently “fun” hehe
2025-09-21 13:04:56
Chat: I don’t think so actually
2025-09-21 13:05:05
Chat: Damn I’m kinda realizing how lame I am for an Arkansan
2025-09-21 13:05:21
Chat: My parents never really took me anywhere 😭
2025-09-21 13:05:38
Chat: Are you big on national parks?
2025-09-21 13:05:48
Chat: It’s my dream to see almost all of them one day
2025-09-21 23:54:57
Chat: Ahh 😅 I have not been to a SINGLE national park
2025-09-21 23:55:02
Chat: Wait I can explain
2025-09-21 23:55:22
Chat: So I’ve been really busy grinding for work and grad school the past few years and I didn’t have the time to travel
2025-09-21 23:55:38
Chat: I just finished grad school in December so this year I started traveling again
2025-09-21 23:56:02
Chat: Problem now is I genuinely have no one to go to national parks with :’) otherwise I’d plan the heck outta those trips
2025-09-21 23:56:55
Chat: Every time I visit a new place I do try to visit a state park or go hiking! I even have a nice pair of hiking boots 😭😭😭
2025-09-21 23:57:05
Chat: But ugh I am yet to see the beauty of our world
2025-09-23 01:57:44
Chat: Do tell me more!!
2025-09-26 03:37:03

Match # 793

2025-09-21 02:27:04
Match
2025-09-21 13:07:22
Chat: Hey how’s it going :) do anything fun this weekend?
2025-09-22 20:32:49
Chat: Oooh that sounds fun! What are you reading rn? I might need a good book recommendation
2025-09-22 23:55:58
Chat: Omg
2025-09-22 23:56:07
Chat: I think I read Klara and the sun
2025-09-22 23:56:11
Chat: I have the book for sure
2025-09-22 23:56:19
Chat: I can’t remember if I’ve read it or not
2025-09-22 23:56:50
Chat: It’s been a while since I’ve read a fiction book, I’m more into non fiction these days 😅😅
2025-09-22 23:57:18
Chat: I swear, I’m not like a super tech/finance bro or anything, I just DEVOUR books on neuroscience/self help/psychiatry
2025-09-23 15:14:22
Chat: If you’d like a healthy and easy introduction, I recommend the book called The Molecule of More!
2025-09-23 15:14:30
Chat: It’s about dopamine and the reward circuit pathway
2025-09-23 15:14:41
Chat: Highly applicable to Gen Z in particular 😅😅
2025-09-23 15:14:52
Chat: It changed my life honestly
2025-09-23 15:15:19
Chat: But if you have some good fiction books that you recommend I will happily take them :) I’m flying out to Chicago tmrw and would love smth to read on the flight!
2025-09-23 18:48:22
Chat: I’m visiting my parents for a few days
2025-09-23 18:48:38
Chat: It’s a big religious holiday rn for us Hindu folks
2025-09-23 18:49:01
Chat: And my mom wanted me to come home and celebrate with the family (aside from my sister who’s in college rn)
2025-09-23 18:49:11
Chat: I will definitely check out Never Let Me Go!
2025-09-23 18:49:19
Chat: Thank you for the recommendation 🥹
2025-09-23 18:49:47
Chat: Molecule of More is also a very digestible read btw, nothing too intense or complex, very fun too!
2025-09-23 18:50:06
Chat: We should definitely yap about books in person sometime if you’re down :)
2025-09-23 21:09:31
Chat: We should text and maybe FaceTime while I’m in Chicago! My number is +15515564999

2025-10-19 18:54:41
Chat: Heyyy how’s it going!!!
2025-10-19 18:54:56
Chat: So what are your Diwali plans
2025-10-20 12:34:20
Chat: Omgg I’m jealous
2025-10-20 12:34:27
Chat: Haven’t celebrated diwali in India in years
2025-10-20 12:35:25
Chat: I’m going to a celebration in Seaport today actually :)
2025-10-20 12:35:44
Chat: But I went to the temple with friends this weekend and also a Diwali event at night!
2025-10-20 12:35:50
Chat: It was fun
2025-10-20 12:35:54
Chat: Got to wear my new lehenga
2025-10-21 15:16:27
Chat: Seaport is downtown manhattan, near the east river
2025-10-21 15:16:34
Chat: Close to where I live!
2025-10-21 15:16:48
Chat: I’m from Chennai! I’m Tamil 🤪
2025-10-21 15:16:57
Chat: I’ve been in the US since I was 5
2025-10-21 15:17:10

2025-10-22 02:31:10

2025-10-22 02:31:16
Chat: I think maybe my one friend
2025-10-22 02:31:20

2025-10-22 02:31:35

2025-10-22 02:32:06
Chat: I just visited Delhi for the first time in February it was great
2025-10-22 02:32:26
Chat: I would show you the pics I took but alas hinge is stupid and doesn’t allow pics!

2025-09-24 12:22:00

2025-09-24 22:05:13
Chat: Nice!
2025-09-24 22:05:33
Chat: I wouldn’t say I know too much about the city 😅 I suppose I’m a little well versed
2025-09-24 23:02:37
Chat: lol NYC
2025-09-24 23:02:45
Chat: Why would you think I live in Jersey?
2025-09-25 02:18:54
Chat: Wait so you can’t be new to the city the
2025-09-25 02:18:59
Chat: *then
2025-09-25 02:19:03
Chat: You live in Jersey
2025-09-25 02:19:14
Chat: You’re technically new to Jersey
2025-09-25 02:19:40
Chat: I came here for my job in 2022

2025-09-24 12:22:51
Match
2025-09-24 22:05:51
Chat: Do you go to therapy?
2025-09-25 17:15:11
Chat: I totally get that!
2025-09-25 17:16:19
Chat: I love my therapist, I’ve been seeing this specific one for 3 years
2025-09-25 17:16:32
Chat: It’s a green flag when a guy goes to therapy
2025-09-25 17:16:45
Chat: I feel like mental health is particularly undervalued in men
2025-09-25 17:21:54
Chat: I feel like guys in the past have run away when I tell them that I take mental health treatment very seriously
2025-09-25 17:22:05
Chat: So I appreciate that you took the initiative to have a conversation about it :)
2025-09-25 17:22:17
Chat: I don’t want to be labeled as crazy
2025-09-25 17:34:56
Chat: I’ve literally been dumped / called crazy for my “takes” on mental health treatment lol
2025-09-25 17:35:00
Chat: I don’t even have takes imo
2025-09-25 17:35:17
Chat: I just think that a good majority of ppl need therapy and probably pharmaceuticals 😭😭
2025-09-25 17:35:34
Chat: I actually just started ADHD meds post diagnosis and my life has skyrocketed for the better
2025-09-25 23:44:08
Chat: Yeahhhhh it’s kind of crazy how many people (of minority especially) don’t seek out help when they need it
2025-09-25 23:44:35
Chat: On an unrelated note, what hedge fund do you work at? I was just at Millennium (in between jobs now)
2025-09-25 23:47:42
Chat: I was on the market data team before I got laid off :’)
2025-09-25 23:47:53
Chat: I actually just applied to square point I think 🤔
2025-09-26 03:21:57
Chat: Omg no worries lol
2025-09-26 03:22:01
Chat: I appreciate it!
2025-09-26 03:22:21
Chat: I’m doing ok tho, getting lots of interviews and stuff
2025-09-26 03:22:29
Chat: So it’ll be ok 🥹
2025-09-26 03:22:41
Chat: How’s your week going btw? You doing anything next week?
2025-09-26 11:43:27
Chat: Ahhh yeah, such is the way with finance
2025-09-26 11:43:37
Chat: Oooh where you off to?
2025-09-26 13:34:41
Chat: Fun fun
2025-09-26 13:34:49
Chat: NOLA is awesome but I haven’t been in a while
2025-09-26 13:35:01
Chat: When are you back?
2025-09-26 18:05:06
Chat: Lmaooo I haven’t been in 10 years so I have no recommendations
2025-09-26 18:05:14
Chat: I’m sorry 😅
2025-09-27 04:39:53
Chat: Oh nooooo
2025-09-27 04:39:56
Chat: What happened
2025-09-27 12:28:27
Chat: Omg whaaaa
2025-09-27 12:28:34
Chat: Wdym you got stuck trading 😭😭
2025-09-27 12:28:41
Chat: You had a flight to catch!
2025-09-27 16:55:03
Chat: Oooooof
2025-09-27 16:55:08
Chat: I’m really sorry to hear that :(
2025-09-27 16:55:22
Chat: Were you able to reschedule your trip?
2025-09-27 22:33:05
Chat: I’m flying back from Chicago! At the airport rn
2025-09-27 22:33:18
Chat: Btw you never mentioned where this weekend getaway was 👀
2025-09-27 22:34:25
Chat: oh right
2025-09-27 22:34:29
Chat: Ok I just scrolled up
2025-09-27 22:34:32
Chat: Ok so here’s the thing
2025-09-27 22:34:38
Chat: I am TERRIBLE about texting
2025-09-27 22:34:50
Chat: All my conversations w friends family etc over text are a blur
2025-09-27 22:34:57
Chat: Not just w strangers 😅
2025-09-27 22:35:17
Chat: Also I have been like majorly stressed out about this job interview so I’ve also been EXTREMELY scatterbrained
2025-09-27 22:35:48
Chat: It’s at this small firm in Connecticut
2025-09-27 22:35:56
Chat: I would commute 4 days a week
2025-09-27 22:36:11
Chat: Ahhh if I say I will jinx myself
2025-09-27 22:36:21
Chat: I’m a little superstitious
2025-09-27 22:36:29
Chat: But yes you should text me! My number is +15515564999

2025-09-25 14:09:50
Match
2025-09-25 17:18:26
Chat: Haha the spirits sound like my vibe so far
2025-09-25 17:18:32
Chat: What are you getting your PhD in?
2025-09-26 11:19:23
Chat: Ahhh
2025-09-26 11:19:30
Chat: It means I help rich ppl get richer 😅
2025-09-26 11:19:35
Chat: It’s a sad role
2025-09-26 11:19:43
Chat: Environmental engineering is sick tho
2025-09-26 11:19:46
Chat: That’s so cool
2025-09-26 11:19:50
Chat: Tell me everything
2025-09-27 22:32:47
Chat: This is really sexy talk btw
2025-09-27 22:37:09
Chat: lol I’m sorry the sarcasm did NOT come across 😭😭😭
2025-09-27 22:37:15
Chat: It’s ok tho
2025-09-27 22:37:22
Chat: I do appreciate that you’re passionate
2025-09-27 22:37:34
Chat: And fwiw I am extremely passionate about the environment and climate change
2025-09-27 22:37:48
Chat: So all good!!
2025-09-27 22:37:59
Chat: Your research seems very cool
2025-09-27 22:38:05
Chat: And honestly save those fucking fish
2025-09-27 22:39:29
Chat: I don’t doubt it!!
2025-09-27 22:40:08
Chat: Swimmable water bahut zaroori hai
2025-09-27 22:40:14
Chat: (I’m taking Hindi lessons)
2025-09-27 22:41:52
Chat: Ahh I see
2025-09-27 22:41:55
Chat: No worries
2025-09-27 22:42:45
Chat: I was actually born in India but raised here so I’m kind of a first gen too
2025-09-27 22:42:51
Chat: But I can speak my native as well
2025-09-27 22:45:13
Chat: I can speak Tamil, understand telugu, know a bit of French and Chinese, and am learning Hindi!
2025-09-27 22:47:58
Chat: Hindi is a great language to learn, so is Spanish!
2025-09-27 22:48:03
Chat: I would respect either endeavor
2025-09-27 22:55:06
Chat: Hindi isn’t that bad but Tamil and telugu were my first languages
2025-09-27 22:55:16
Chat: So I think Hindi came naturally to me for a lot of reasons
2025-09-27 22:55:27
Chat: You might be onto something here 🤔
2025-09-27 22:55:43
Chat: I’m down too! I am free Monday night after my big big job interview
2025-09-27 22:55:49
Chat: Actually wait
2025-09-27 22:55:58
Chat: I have more job interviews this week 😬
2025-09-27 22:56:28
Chat: We might have to either skip drinks and just do a coffee/ice cream/dinner or get drinks on Thursday
2025-09-27 23:05:01
Chat: I’m applying for SWE roles in financial firms and startups
2025-09-27 23:05:42
Chat: My number is +15515564999 if you want to text me :)
2025-10-03 16:02:10

Chat: Hmm my go to coffee order might be a medium drip coffee with cream and one sugar 😅😅😅
2025-09-26 03:24:42

Chat: Am I a bad person
2025-09-26 03:24:56

2025-09-26 03:25:02

2025-09-26 13:35:27
Chat: Hmmmm idk actually but I definitely have a favorite study spot (I’ll tell you once I know you better hehe)
2025-09-26 13:35:41

Chat: I’m not too far from it! Also I just like their coffee a lot, it’s pretty smooth

2025-09-27 19:23:29
Chat: It’s safe and chill

2025-09-27 19:24:02

Chat: Hey how’s it going
2025-09-26 11:20:30
Chat: It’s alright. I’m actually in Chicago rn visiting family but I’m back on Saturday night
2025-09-26 11:20:41
Chat: If you’ve heard of Navrathri, that’s what I’m here for :)
2025-09-26 11:20:45
Chat: How’s your week been?
2025-09-26 13:33:51
Chat: I love Garba!
2025-09-26 13:34:05
Chat: Also yes good morning!
2025-09-26 13:34:22

2025-09-26 18:05:59

2025-09-26 19:36:39

Chat: Love the cat! I have 3 myself 😅😭
2025-09-26 11:44:25

2025-09-26 11:44:34

2025-09-26 11:44:40
Chat: I love them so much
2025-09-26 11:44:43
Chat: They’re my children
2025-09-26 11:44:47
Chat: I can’t imagine life without them
2025-09-26 11:44:59
Chat: But I’m currently at home in Chicago so spending more time with our family dog hehe
2025-09-26 13:36:06
Chat: Roman!!!
2025-09-26 13:36:12
Chat: I was going for the mythology theme haha

Chat: How’s your week going?

2025-09-27 04:43:24
Chat: I’m sorry to hear that you experienced that :(
2025-09-27 04:44:30
Chat: Ppl who get aggressive, especially physically, bc they didn’t get their way need therapy sooooo badly

2025-09-27 22:47:30

Chat: Now I’m just sitting here at the gate
2025-09-27 22:47:39

Chat: lol it’s Amirtha*
2025-09-27 18:56:19
Chat: But not much, how are you
2025-09-28 03:47:17
Chat: Thank you I appreciate it
2025-09-28 03:48:02
Chat: It’s always interesting to me when ppl misspell my name either on this app or even on work emails
2025-09-28 03:48:30
Chat: Especially in work emails, I have literally signed the email with my name 😭😭
2025-09-28 03:48:42
Chat: Anyway - just got back to NYC from Chicago!
2025-09-28 03:48:47
Chat: How has your weekend been

Chat: I was asleep lol
2025-09-28 11:47:18
Chat: Good morning!
2025-09-28 11:47:43
Chat: Hope you had a fun night out :)
2025-09-28 17:31:51
Chat: It was good
2025-09-28 17:31:58
Chat: I’m studying now for a major job interview tmrw

2025-09-27 21:20:57
Match
2025-09-27 22:34:11
Chat: My fun fact is that I love calamari btw 🥹
2025-09-28 03:45:12
Chat: I’m watching shrinking on Apple TV, have you heard of it?
2025-09-28 15:05:03
Chat: It’s about a therapist and his close circle around him
2025-09-28 15:05:11
Chat: It’s like a dramedy
2025-09-28 15:05:18
Chat: It’s a GREAT show
2025-09-28 15:05:29
Chat: I highly recommend
2025-09-28 15:05:57
Chat: I haven’t seen better call Saul but I’ve been told it’s great
2025-09-28 15:06:13
Chat: How many seasons is it?
2025-09-28 17:32:16
Chat: I have seen Breaking Bad!
2025-09-28 17:32:19
Chat: It was alright
2025-09-28 17:32:26
Chat: I think everyone overhyped it to me lol
2025-09-28 17:32:40
Chat: I think it was good but like…
2025-09-28 17:32:41
Chat: Idk
2025-09-28 17:32:45
Chat: Good writing and all that
2025-09-28 17:32:50
Chat: Just not my kind of TV show
2025-09-29 01:12:08
Chat: It was alright. Flew back from Chicago
2025-09-29 01:12:20
Chat: I just grinded for an interview today for like almost 9-10 hours
2025-09-29 01:12:25
Chat: I’m a little dead inside lol
2025-09-29 01:12:39
Chat: So I’m probably gonna take a sleep aid and pass out lol
2025-09-29 01:12:45
Chat: How was your weekend?
2025-09-29 01:51:52
Chat: It’s tmrw afternoon but I’m heading up in the morning and studying nearby
2025-09-29 01:52:09
Chat: The football today was so mid tier lol
2025-09-29 13:38:29
Chat: Oh no he’s an eagles fan 😬
2025-09-29 13:38:33
Chat: Ok I like Jalen Hurts
2025-09-29 13:38:41
Chat: But otherwise eagles fans are notorious
2025-09-29 21:38:12
Chat: Ok I am a dolphins fan
2025-09-29 21:38:12
Chat: Ugh lol
2025-09-29 21:38:12
Chat: Laugh all you want it’s ok I can take it
2025-09-30 00:51:50
Chat: I just really liked Mike McDaniel and Tua haha
2025-09-30 00:51:53
Chat: And now…
2025-09-30 00:51:56
Chat: :’D
2025-09-30 00:52:12
Chat: How did you become an eagles fan
2025-09-30 03:11:42
Chat: According to my friend his leg could get amputated
2025-09-30 03:11:49
Chat: Worst case scenario
2025-09-30 03:12:23
Chat: I did my undergrad at UIUC! Illinois :)
2025-09-30 13:49:00
Chat: I did see that
2025-09-30 13:49:03
Chat: Idk why he was cheering
2025-09-30 13:50:07
Chat: I studied CS, math, and stats
2025-09-30 13:50:20
Chat: Btw I have a question
2025-09-30 13:50:28
Chat: Why do you have “not political” on your profile?
2025-09-30 13:50:35
Chat: I’m just curious, it’s not a dealbreaker
2025-09-30 14:34:47
Chat: Ahh I see
2025-09-30 16:50:50
Chat: My interview went well I think, but you never know
2025-09-30 16:50:55
Chat: I’m cautiously optimistic
2025-09-30 16:51:11
Chat: I’ll be honest, I am 100% liberal
2025-09-30 16:51:44
Chat: I don’t agree with conservatives in any way shape or form
2025-09-30 16:51:56
Chat: I could be moderate leaning in some cases
2025-09-30 16:52:08
Chat: But otherwise I think conservatives are blundering idiots 😅
2025-09-30 16:52:37
Chat: I like a good debate and discussion but in this country debating with right wingers feels impossible
2025-09-30 16:52:44
Chat: They debate with emotions and not intellect
2025-09-30 23:27:50
Chat: Ahhh so
2025-09-30 23:27:55
Chat: Little caveat
2025-09-30 23:28:01
Chat: I lost my job a few weeks ago
2025-09-30 23:28:08
Chat: And am actively looking for roles
2025-09-30 23:28:21
Chat: I actually just did an onsite yesterday and waiting to hear back from them regarding an offer
2025-09-30 23:28:24
Chat: Fingers crossed
2025-09-30 23:28:30
Chat: Wbu do you work in the city?
2025-10-01 01:31:31
Chat: Ohhh interesting
2025-10-01 01:32:34
Chat: Interesting that you work in Jersey
2025-10-01 01:32:50
Chat: How often do you WFH?
2025-10-01 16:33:38
Chat: Oh nice
2025-10-01 16:33:41
Chat: Where in JC?
2025-10-01 23:24:39
Chat: Yep, I’m in fidi
2025-10-01 23:24:45
Chat: Near WTC actually
2025-10-02 16:46:51
Chat: Hi sorry for the late response
2025-10-02 16:47:18
Chat: Despite being unemployed I’m surprisingly busy with job interview studying and the like 😅 I barely remember to check my notifications and apps
2025-10-02 16:47:23
Chat: I’m free next week!
2025-10-02 20:23:11
Chat: Sounds good to me!
2025-10-10 21:49:46
Chat: Hi! I am so sorry I am just terrible about checking messages on this app
2025-10-10 21:50:22
Chat: I’m free tmrw night if you want to do smth
2025-10-13 00:34:47
Chat: this week might be tough 😭😭
2025-10-13 00:35:00
Chat: My number is +15515564999, let’s coordinate over text

2025-09-30 00:50:58
Chat: I’m good how are you
2025-09-30 12:24:36
Chat: What’s up
2025-09-30 12:26:51
Chat: Ahhh ok, nw
2025-09-30 12:26:55
Chat: How was the flight
2025-09-30 12:28:56
Chat: Tbh I like your profile too 🥹
2025-09-30 12:29:29
Chat: Too cute to be true
2025-09-30 12:29:37
Chat: You must be a jerk IRL
2025-09-30 12:29:45
Chat: :)
2025-09-30 12:30:24
Chat: Did you grow up in the UK?
2025-09-30 12:31:27
Chat: lol I was pretty tactical with my profile wasn’t I
2025-09-30 12:32:22
Chat: I’ve been here for 3 years for my job
2025-09-30 12:32:37
Chat: Grew up in Arkansas, went to school near Chicago
2025-09-30 12:33:05
Chat: I would’ve loved to hear your accent actually I’m such a sucker for British accents
2025-09-30 12:33:54
Chat: I live in FiDi, AKA financial district. Near battery park/wall st
2025-09-30 12:34:40
Chat: Even your messages sound British
2025-09-30 12:34:48
Chat: I can read them in a British accent in my head
2025-09-30 12:35:11
Chat: Definitely a turn on 😅
2025-09-30 12:35:26
Chat: Fidi is a boring place but it’s safe for living here etc
2025-09-30 12:35:52
Chat: A date for sure
2025-09-30 12:37:17
Chat: Also why did your parents name you Milan :) were you born there or smth along those lines
2025-09-30 12:40:26
Chat: YES
2025-09-30 12:40:31
Chat: Sorry that was overly enthusiastic
2025-09-30 12:40:39
Chat: I wanted to ask but wasn’t sure
2025-09-30 12:40:59
Chat: amirthasureshbabu

2025-10-16 22:10:43
Chat: Life with 3 cats is a little hectic but so amazing
2025-10-16 22:10:50
Chat: I wouldn’t have it any other way!!!’
2025-10-16 22:10:54
Chat: I love them so much
2025-10-16 22:11:07

2025-10-17 02:46:06

2025-10-17 02:46:24

Chat: I am unfortunately not free on Sunday evening lol

Chat: I’m going to a DJ set at a rooftop club with a friend

2025-10-14 07:06:13

2025-10-14 23:47:25
Chat: Heyyy how’s it going!
2025-10-16 00:08:13
Chat: I’m doing alright
2025-10-16 00:08:30
Chat: Fun fact I used to be a “musician” in my teens haha
2025-10-16 00:09:00
Chat: But unfortunately you and I were meant to be mortal enemies…
2025-10-16 00:09:05
Chat: I played the violin :(
2025-10-17 02:45:15
Chat: Ikrrrr lol
2025-10-17 02:45:20
Chat: But I loved being in orchestra
2025-10-17 02:45:33
Chat: Being a musician growing up really forced me to be disciplined and appreciate the arts!
2025-10-18 00:47:09
Chat: Yesssss
2025-10-18 00:47:22
Chat: In between jobs rn but my last job was as a software engineer!
2025-10-18 00:47:39
Chat: How many instruments can you play?
2025-10-19 14:08:53
Chat: It’s not very cool, trust me lol
2025-10-19 14:09:02
Chat: It certainly pays the bills but that’s about it 😅
2025-10-19 14:09:09
Chat: How was your weekend?
2025-10-20 00:23:36
Chat: Very busy! It’s Diwali :)
2025-10-20 00:23:40
Chat: Happy Diwali btw hehe
2025-10-20 00:23:49
Chat: I’m also doing some interview / job search work
2025-10-20 00:23:55
Chat: It’s all a pain in the ass :’)
2025-10-20 00:24:08
Chat: At least I don’t have Sunday scaries since I don’t have a job 😭😭
2025-10-21 01:56:47
Chat: How was your Monday?
2025-10-21 01:56:59
Chat: Out of curiosity, what are your hours like as a musician?
2025-10-22 02:28:08
Chat: Omggg that sounds fun
2025-10-22 02:28:13
Chat: What kind of music did you write

Match # 1180

2025-10-16 00:10:20
Chat: Is that you playing jazz piano???
2025-10-16 00:10:20
Match
2025-10-16 01:40:19
Chat: I used to play piano growing up… but classical 😬
2025-10-16 01:40:24
Chat: I’m more of a Chopin girl ahhh
2025-10-16 01:40:31
Chat: But jazz is so damn impressive
2025-10-16 01:40:50
Chat: What got you into jazz piano
2025-10-16 02:53:17
Chat: I got busy with college and then working!
2025-10-16 02:53:50
Chat: I have a full length keyboard in my apartment tho :) sometimes I like to jam!
2025-10-16 13:26:09
Chat: I studied math, CS, and statistics!
2025-10-16 23:17:27
Chat: Ahh well
2025-10-16 23:17:33
Chat: I was a software engineer!
2025-10-16 23:17:37
Chat: In between jobs rn :)
2025-10-16 23:17:45
Chat: What do you do?
2025-10-17 02:44:08
Chat: I’m not sure what I want to do but I’m casting a wide net and seeing what sticks!
2025-10-17 02:44:17
Chat: Oh nice! How do you like JPM?
2025-10-17 02:44:21
Chat: I used to be at GS
2025-10-18 00:50:53
Chat: Lmaooo
2025-10-18 00:51:05
Chat: I did not like GS but it was a good role
2025-10-18 00:51:07
Chat: I learned a lot
2025-10-18 00:51:15
Chat: I’m glad I transitioned to millennium
2025-10-18 00:51:39
Chat: I’m aiming for a startup kind of role next!
2025-10-18 21:04:10
Chat: Yessss it’s Diwali!
2025-10-18 21:04:17
Chat: So I’m celebrating Diwali with friends :)
2025-10-18 21:04:22
Chat: Wbu, up to anything fun?
2025-10-18 23:12:59
Chat: Ahh ok ok
2025-10-18 23:13:20
Chat: Tbh I think you should just watch a movie and chill :)
2025-10-19 14:08:02
Chat: Hiiii good morning!
2025-10-19 14:08:10
Chat: I am so sorry, ended up having a long night lol
2025-10-19 14:08:18
Chat: I’m definitely down for a movie night sometime tho :)
2025-10-19 18:53:28
Chat: It was fun!!
2025-10-19 18:53:33
Chat: I got to dress up and dance haha
2025-10-19 18:53:40
Chat: And had Popeyes afterwards it was great lol
2025-10-19 18:54:05
Chat: How was your night?
2025-10-20 00:24:28
Chat: That’s great! Can’t relate I went to bed at like 4 AM and woke up at 8:30 :’)
2025-10-20 12:36:15
Chat: Yeah I slept like a rock lol
2025-10-20 12:36:19
Chat: Good morning!
2025-10-20 12:36:30
Chat: What’s your week looking like in the evenings?
2025-10-21 15:15:33
Chat: Ahh man I’m not free tn :((
2025-10-21 15:15:48
Chat: I was thinking maybe we could hang out!
2025-10-21 15:15:54
Chat: Let’s try to plan smth soon :)
2025-10-21 19:48:45
Chat: Hmmm I’ll lyk about tmrw night? I think I’m free after 9:30 PM tmrw

Match # 1192

2025-10-16 22:12:19
Remove

Match # 1193

2025-10-16 22:12:29
Match
2025-10-16 22:12:59
Chat: I love learning languages!! I picked up French in high school, Chinese in college, and now Hindi as an adult
2025-10-16 22:13:17
Chat: What are you currently learning?
2025-10-17 02:44:42
Chat: I can’t write mandarin anymore but I can still read a little bit of it :)
2025-10-17 02:44:54
Chat: Spanish is a great language to pick up!!!
2025-10-17 02:44:58
Chat: I wish I knew more of it
2025-10-17 02:45:08
Chat: What inspired you to learn Spanish?
2025-10-18 00:49:46
Chat: I am technically South Indian and Hindi is a North Indian language so I decided to pick up Hindi since it’s universally spoken in India!
2025-10-18 00:50:02
Chat: I’d like to be able to travel across India comfortably
2025-10-18 00:50:11
Chat: So I take virtual lessons :)
2025-10-18 00:50:35
Chat: Chinese can be difficult but the grammar isn’t too bad unlike Spanish and French 😭😭 I have a hard time memorizing all those rules!
2025-10-18 00:50:45
Chat: How are you enjoying learning Spanish?
2025-10-19 14:09:59
Chat: I haven’t through too much of India but I just had a big trip in late Feb!
2025-10-19 14:10:05
Chat: I’m trying to travel more
2025-10-19 14:10:23
Chat: I couldn’t for a while bc I was doing work and grad school simultaneously!
2025-10-19 14:10:38
Chat: Immersive learning is the best learning!
2025-10-19 14:11:10
Chat: Btw I hate the UI on this app lol and I also don’t have notifications enabled, so if you do want to text me :) my number is +15515564999

Chat: Haha thank you!
2025-10-21 19:49:26
Chat: You say this as I got my second nostril pierced today 😬😬😬
2025-10-21 19:49:32
Chat: I’m ngl it looks pretty fire
2025-10-21 19:49:37
Chat: I got a very small opal stud
2025-10-21 19:49:58

2025-10-21 19:50:05

Chat: It’s soooo pretty

2025-10-25 18:56:45
Chat: Aaron Rodgers 😭😭😭
2025-10-25 19:53:29
Chat: Y’all lost the unc bowl unfortunately
2025-10-25 19:53:32
Chat: But it’s ok
2025-10-25 19:53:40
Chat: At least you’re not a dolphins fan like me :’)
2025-10-26 00:19:44
Chat: We’re so screwed against the falcons this weekend lol
2025-10-26 00:19:46
Chat: Oh well
2025-10-26 00:19:58
Chat: I actually stopped watching the dolphins games after a while
2025-10-26 00:20:02
Chat: Too heartbreaking!
2025-10-26 12:29:53
Chat: Ughhhh jealous!!
2025-10-26 12:29:58
Chat: Also good morning :)
2025-10-26 12:30:18
Chat: I’m ngl I had a TERRIBLE Saturday night lol
2025-10-26 12:30:21
Chat: How was yours?
2025-10-26 13:27:36
Chat: My friend (well not friend nowww 🥲) got absolutely shitfaced
2025-10-26 13:27:41
Chat: Like unbelievably shitfaced
2025-10-26 13:27:49
Chat: Seriously fucking shitfaced
2025-10-26 13:27:56
Chat: And just ruined my night
2025-10-26 13:28:14
Chat: She is *26* and clearly has a drinking problem
2025-10-26 13:28:29
Chat: Like she at one point was like “sorry for being a menace”
2025-10-26 13:28:49
Chat: YES
2025-10-26 13:29:02
Chat: She was screaming at me shit like “I’m fucking sober” in front of cops
2025-10-26 13:29:07
Chat: And stumbling
2025-10-26 13:29:14
Chat: And letting random guys hit on her
2025-10-26 13:29:26
Chat: She has no sense of limits when it comes to alcohol
2025-10-26 13:29:39
Chat: We could’ve gotten arrested for public intoxication
2025-10-26 13:30:07
Chat: Like she was being SOOOO annoying and she wouldn’t even let me book an uber
2025-10-26 13:30:22
Chat: We had to take the fucking J train back from bushwick to her place
2025-10-26 13:30:35
Chat: Granted it was a one shot so it was ok but everyone was so creepy and laughing at us
2025-10-26 13:30:59
Chat: YES lol it’s NFL Sunday so I am just happy to be free from the drama
2025-10-26 13:31:32
Chat: Lmaoooo
2025-10-26 13:31:38
Chat: I don’t follow European football
2025-10-26 13:31:42
Chat: What’s your fave club
2025-10-26 13:32:06
Chat: Ah right you mentioned this
2025-10-26 13:32:15
Chat: Are they good this season?
2025-10-26 15:35:34
Chat: Ohhh really? Who are they playing?
2025-10-26 18:21:05
Chat: Omggg that’s my best friends fav team haha
2025-10-26 18:21:43
Chat: Ahh looks like Barca lost
2025-10-26 18:21:46
Chat: I’m sorry :(
2025-10-26 21:27:18
Chat: Relatable
2025-10-26 21:27:34
Chat: I’m at the Zohran rally rn lol
2025-10-26 21:27:37
Chat: In forest hills
2025-10-26 21:27:39
Chat: Very hype!
2025-10-27 02:43:31
Chat: I’m not defining anything rn in terms of what I’m looking for but if someone comes along that I really vibe with, then I’m definitely interested in getting to know them and spending time with them and seeing where things go!
2025-10-27 02:43:33
Chat: Wbu?
2025-10-27 13:21:58
Chat: Ohhh you live in Florida?
2025-10-27 16:29:49
Chat: Oh nice
2025-10-27 16:29:57
Chat: Do you have parents/siblings here?
2025-10-27 22:04:08
Chat: Nice nice
2025-10-27 22:04:27
Chat: Are you in NYC rn or FL?
2025-10-28 01:14:05
Chat: Oh cool! Let’s meet when you’re back :)
2025-11-03 00:53:28
Chat: Heyyy what’s up!! You’re back in NY?

2025-10-25 20:28:06
Chat: How cold is too cold for you haha
2025-10-26 18:22:14
Chat: I think for me, too cold is 20 degrees Fahrenheit
2025-10-26 18:22:24
Chat: Are you a Celsius or Fahrenheit person?
2025-10-27 13:24:04
Chat: I can walk in cold weather!!!
2025-10-27 13:24:13
Chat: I grew up in Arkansas and went to school in Illinois lol
2025-10-27 13:24:17
Chat: So I can brave it :)
2025-10-27 13:24:30
Chat: Where in India are you from
2025-10-27 22:02:06
Chat: Nice I’m jealous! Diwali in India must’ve been nice
2025-10-27 22:02:26
Chat: I’m from Chennai btw lol
2025-10-27 22:02:30
Chat: Tamil girlie
2025-10-27 22:02:52
Chat: How long were you in India for Diwali?
2025-10-28 13:29:56
Chat: I was just in India in Feb and March :)
2025-10-28 13:30:00
Chat: It was amazing
2025-10-28 13:30:05
Chat: Went back after 6 long years
2025-10-28 13:30:11
Chat: It was just the best
2025-10-28 13:30:16
Chat: I miss it so much
2025-10-28 13:30:34
Chat: Best of luck at immigration I know they’re assholes there 😬
2025-10-28 15:00:07
Chat: Highlight of the trip was definitely Taj Mahal 😬
2025-10-28 15:00:19
Chat: The FOOD ahhh
2025-10-28 15:00:21
Chat: So, so good
2025-10-28 15:00:25
Chat: We were touring Rajasthan
2025-10-28 15:00:32
Chat: Rajasthani food is actually amazing
2025-10-28 19:57:53
Chat: I LOVE spicy food haha
2025-10-28 19:58:21
Chat: Ahh I would love to go for a matcha but my sister is in town this weekend. How about next week?
2025-10-30 02:59:33
Chat: My sister and I are going to the tame impala concert on Saturday! That’s why she’s coming to the city haha
2025-10-30 03:00:06
Chat: Let’s do smth next week fs
2025-11-02 16:40:22
Chat: Weekdays are fine this week!
2025-11-02 16:40:30
Chat: Seaport is next to Fidi
2025-11-02 16:40:34
Chat: I actually live in fidi lol
2025-11-02 16:40:40
Chat: Idk why hinge thinks I live in seaport

2025-11-30 02:00:01.621
Chat: That’s a sad life
2025-11-30 02:00:05.685
Chat: For both of us lol
2025-11-30 02:00:24.094
Chat: Lemme guess - Patriots? I guess you should be happy since drake maye and all that
2025-11-30 02:00:39.782
Chat: I am unfortunately a dolphins fan 🐬🙃
2025-11-30 23:41:25.667
Chat: I used to be a big TB12 girl growing up
2025-11-30 23:41:36.616
Chat: He’s still great but his veneers drive me insane, they look TERRIBLE
2025-11-30 23:42:13.632
Chat: How was your Thanksgiving break?

Match # 1544

2025-11-29 18:58:47.463685
Like
2025-11-29 19:59:49.581
Match
2025-11-30 02:01:02.283
Chat: Heyyy happy Saturday!
2025-11-30 02:01:15.673
Chat: It’s going alright, kinda sad cuz I have no plans tn lol
2025-11-30 02:01:19.182
Chat: I suppose it’s fine
2025-11-30 02:01:41.886
Chat: I’m just working on my startup (she says, realizing how cringe and tech bro-y she sounds)
2025-11-30 23:42:41.731
Chat: I’m building a dating app better than Hinge 🤦‍♀️
2025-11-30 23:43:24.252
Chat: I saw a video recently of someone saying that this is the PERFECT time for another app to come in and take the reins
2025-11-30 23:43:47.629
Chat: Granted I was working on this prior to seeing that video but now I’m even more excited 😈
2025-11-30 23:43:57.649
Chat: How was your Thanksgiving?
2025-12-01 03:01:51.581
Chat: I can tell you more about the dating app in person if you’d like
2025-12-01 03:02:09.408
Chat: Can’t share my secrets here
2025-12-01 20:50:11.029
Chat: Tbh I’m down tn if you wanna hang out!
2025-12-02 01:10:40.469
Chat: Sure sounds good :)
2025-12-02 01:10:49.10
Chat: You wanna text me? My number is +15515564999

2025-12-02 02:50:31.397
Match
2025-12-02 04:19:25.696
Chat: Sooo I have a dumb question for you
2025-12-02 04:19:44.447
Chat: Have you been to mass at St Patrick’s here in the city
2025-12-02 15:06:46.015
Chat: I just noticed that you’re catholic on your profile so I was wondering!
2025-12-02 15:06:53.308
Chat: I’m Hindu but I’ve been to mass there too
2025-12-02 15:06:58.982
Chat: It was so beautiful 🥹
2025-12-02 15:07:35.035
Chat: I’m ngl, Catholic churches are so beautiful and auspicious
2025-12-02 15:08:24.339
Chat: There’s a nice cathedral in St Louis as well that’s one of my core memories growing up
2025-12-02 16:02:45.578
Chat: Wait does St Patrick’s have Christmas displays??
2025-12-02 16:02:48.91
Chat: That’s wild
2025-12-02 16:02:54.196
Chat: I would love to see that
2025-12-02 16:04:00.99
Chat: Maybe for our first date we can check out the Rockefeller Christmas tree and then the display inside St Patrick’s during visiting hours!
2025-12-02 21:33:32.988
Chat: Ooh what was your old job
2025-12-02 21:33:44.085
Chat: Also yesss I’m glad you’re down 🥹
2025-12-02 21:34:05.93
Chat: Tbh a good touristy vibe sounds fun for a date haha
2025-12-02 21:34:13.215
Chat: Btw what are you studying at NYU?
2025-12-03 00:44:39.188
Chat: That’s so cool!
2025-12-03 00:44:48.179
Chat: You should text me btw
2025-12-03 00:44:51.317
Chat: 5515564999

6. Question Text: Let’s make sure we’re on the same page about

Type: text

Answer Text: Therapy. Mental health treatment is undervalued!

Type: text

Answer Text: Therapy. Mental health is undervalued!

8. Question Text: The way to win me over is

Type: text

Answer Text: A walk in the city, coffee or matcha in hand, people watching and laughing together :)

Created: 2025-07-28 17:53:40.909762

Updated: 2025-11-15 07:23:06


9. Question Text: My cry-in-the-car song is

Type: text

Answer Text: Arms by Paper Kites! The lyrics get to me every time 🥹

Created: 2025-07-28 17:53:40.909762

Updated: 2025-11-15 07:23:06


10. Question Text:

Type: text

Answer Text: The lifespan of a supermassive black hole or pretty much anything about cosmology

Created: 2025-11-15 07:23:06.240954

Updated: 2025-11-15 07:23:06.240954


11. Question Text: My simple pleasures

Type: text

Answer Text: Waking up with my cats, long phone calls, rewatching How to with John Wilson (the most underrated show of all time), and unfortunately the AFC East

Created: 2025-11-15 07:23:06.240954

Updated: 2025-11-15 07:23:06.240954


12. Question Text: Let’s make sure we’re on the same page about

Type: text

Answer Text: Going to therapy. Mental health is undervalued and overlooked!

Created: 2025-11-15 07:23:06.240954

Updated: 2025-12-01 20:53:30


13. Question Text: A life goal of mine

Type: text

Answer Text: Build a dating app better than this one (currently in the works, ask me about it!)
